crime.value: Multiple incidents including attempted murder by suffocation and Richard's death, with Zac as suspected killer
crime.quote: My face feels the pressure of a pillow and I black out.

victim.value: Richard, who apparently discovered the killer's identity before being killed
victim.quote: he told me on the phone that he had something important to talk about and he'd talk to me after getting home

closed_world.value: A neighborhood where the crimes occur, described as having become a 'crime-spot'
closed_world.quote: This house has become a full-blown crime-spot.

culprit_and_motive.value: Zac appears to be the killer, though specific motive is unclear from excerpt
culprit_and_motive.quote: maybe he doubted Zac from the beginning

resolution.value: Zac has been sent to jail, though questions remain about what Richard discovered
resolution.quote: the psychotic monster won't be able to escape

investigator.value: Evelyn Lawrence, first-person narrator experiencing and investigating the crimes
investigator.quote: Miss Evelyn Lawrence? The doctor is here to check on you.

red_herring.value: Medical equipment malfunction initially appears to be natural causes before pillow suffocation attempt is revealed
red_herring.quote: The blipping of the machines becomes absolutely deafening... My face feels the pressure of a pillow and I black out.

clue_fairness.value: Reader experiences the pillow suffocation attempt simultaneously with protagonist - hand movement and pillow pressure described
clue_fairness.quote: I find my right hand reaching out to the pillow beside me... I clearly am not the one who is moving it.

social_world.value: Family care structure with medical/hospital authority figures and neighborhood surveillance dynamics
social_world.quote: I cannot afford to lose anyone of the family anymore Eve... Promise me you'll live.

alibi.value: Aron seen running from backyard the previous night, establishing timeline and location evidence
alibi.quote: Mr. Sanchez said how he saw Aron the previous night running away from his backyard.

reveal_mechanic.value: Richard had evidence about the killer's identity before being sent to jail, creating deferred revelation structure
reveal_mechanic.quote: he told me on the phone that he had something important to talk about and he'd talk to me after getting home.

media_and_audience.value: House characterized as crime scene requiring relocation for mental peace and fresh start
media_and_audience.quote: This house has become a full-blown crime-spot... you guys have to move to a new house, new neighborhood

investigator_wound.value: Protagonist's guilt over sending Richard to jail before he could reveal crucial information about the killer
investigator_wound.quote: Guess I ruined that with my own hand inviting all those tortures for later.

_meta.title: ebook radia al rashid eyes like ice
